query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- Lesson 7: Discipleship Relationships (750020)
(750020, 'Paul described his discipleship relationship as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Professional teaching","Spiritual parenting","Business partnership","Casual friendship"]', 'Spiritual parenting', 1),
(750020, 'One-on-one discipleship is effective because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It''s easier","It provides personalized attention and accountability","It''s faster","It requires less commitment"]', 'It provides personalized attention and accountability', 2),
(750020, 'Small group discipleship offers:', 'multiple_choice', '["Anonymity","Community, diverse perspectives, and mutual encouragement","Less accountability","Faster results"]', 'Community, diverse perspectives, and mutual encouragement', 3),
(750020, 'Active listening in discipleship involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Waiting to speak","Fully engaging with understanding and empathy","Giving quick advice","Interrupting with solutions"]', 'Fully engaging with understanding and empathy', 4),
(750020, 'Asking good questions helps disciples:', 'multiple_choice', '["Feel interrogated","Think deeply and discover truth","Avoid responsibility","Depend on the mentor"]', 'Think deeply and discover truth', 5),
(750020, 'Accountability in discipleship should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Harsh and judgmental","Loving, honest, and growth-oriented","Optional","One-way only"]', 'Loving, honest, and growth-oriented', 6),
(750020, 'The triad model of discipleship involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["One teacher, many students","Three people meeting together for mutual growth","Large group meetings","Online only"]', 'Three people meeting together for mutual growth', 7),
(750020, 'Sustainable discipleship systems require:', 'multiple_choice', '["One charismatic leader","Reproducible processes and multiple leaders","Expensive resources","Professional staff only"]', 'Reproducible processes and multiple leaders', 8),
(750020, 'Hebrews 10:24-25 emphasizes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Individual spirituality","Spurring one another toward love and good deeds","Avoiding fellowship","Self-sufficiency"]', 'Spurring one another toward love and good deeds', 9),
(750020, 'The best discipleship relationships are characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Formality and distance","Authenticity, vulnerability, and trust","Hierarchy and control","Competition"]', 'Authenticity, vulnerability, and trust', 10),
(750020, 'Describe the key elements of effective discipleship relationships and how to build them.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Effective discipleship relationships require trust, authenticity, regular meeting times, clear expectations, mutual commitment, accountability, prayer, and a focus on both knowledge and life application.', 11),
-- Lesson 8: Spiritual Formation (750021)
(750021, '1 John 2:12-14 describes spiritual growth stages as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Infant, toddler, teen, adult","Children, young men, fathers","Beginner, intermediate, advanced","New, growing, mature"]', 'Children, young men, fathers', 1),
(750021, 'Spiritual disciplines are best understood as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Legalistic requirements","Means of grace for transformation","Optional activities","Earning God''s favor"]', 'Means of grace for transformation', 2),
(750021, 'Bible study in spiritual formation should lead to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Knowledge only","Transformation and obedience","Debate skills","Academic credentials"]', 'Transformation and obedience', 3),
(750021, 'Prayer in discipleship involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Reciting formulas","Developing a conversational relationship with God","Emergency requests only","Public performance"]', 'Developing a conversational relationship with God', 4),
(750021, 'Fasting as a spiritual discipline helps believers:', 'multiple_choice', '["Lose weight","Focus on God and break fleshly patterns","Earn merit","Impress others"]', 'Focus on God and break fleshly patterns', 5),
(750021, 'Common obstacles to spiritual growth include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Too much prayer","Unconfessed sin, neglect, and worldly distractions","Excessive Bible reading","Too much fellowship"]', 'Unconfessed sin, neglect, and worldly distractions', 6),
(750021, 'Philippians 2:12-13 teaches that spiritual growth involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human effort only","God working in us as we work out our salvation","Divine action only","No human responsibility"]', 'God working in us as we work out our salvation', 7),
(750021, 'Assessing spiritual progress helps disciples:', 'multiple_choice', '["Feel guilty","Identify growth areas and celebrate progress","Compare with others","Become prideful"]', 'Identify growth areas and celebrate progress', 8),
(750021, 'Solitude and silence as disciplines help believers:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoid people","Hear God''s voice and reflect deeply","Escape responsibility","Become isolated"]', 'Hear God''s voice and reflect deeply', 9),
(750021, 'Spiritual maturity is evidenced by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Years as a Christian","Fruit of the Spirit and Christlike character","Knowledge accumulation","Leadership positions"]', 'Fruit of the Spirit and Christlike character', 10),
(750021, 'Explain how spiritual disciplines contribute to spiritual formation and growth in Christlikeness.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Spiritual disciplines create space for God to work, break sinful patterns, develop godly habits, deepen relationship with God, and produce the fruit of the Spirit. They are means of grace, not merit.', 11),
-- Lesson 9: Multiplication (750022)
(750022, '2 Timothy 2:2 describes how many generations of disciples?', 'multiple_choice', '["Two","Four","Three","One"]', 'Four', 1),
(750022, 'Spiritual multiplication differs from addition in that:', 'multiple_choice', '["It''s slower","It produces exponential growth","It requires less effort","It''s less biblical"]', 'It produces exponential growth', 2),
(750022, 'The goal of discipleship is not just maturity but:', 'multiple_choice', '["Knowledge","Reproduction of disciple-makers","Church attendance","Personal comfort"]', 'Reproduction of disciple-makers', 3),
(750022, 'Barriers to multiplication include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Too much training","Fear, selfishness, and lack of vision","Excessive prayer","Too much accountability"]', 'Fear, selfishness, and lack of vision', 4),
(750022, 'Releasing disciples to make disciples requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Maintaining control","Trust, training, and letting go","Perfection first","Formal ordination"]', 'Trust, training, and letting go', 5),
(750022, 'John 15:8 says the Father is glorified when we:', 'multiple_choice', '["Attend church","Bear much fruit","Accumulate knowledge","Avoid sinners"]', 'Bear much fruit', 6),
(750022, 'Sustainable multiplication systems identify:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only professional ministers","Potential disciple-makers at every level","The most talented only","Those with degrees"]', 'Potential disciple-makers at every level', 7),
(750022, 'The harvest is plentiful but the workers are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Sufficient","Few","Too many","Not needed"]', 'Few', 8),
(750022, 'Multiplication mindset sees every believer as:', 'multiple_choice', '["A consumer","A potential disciple-maker","A spectator","A project"]', 'A potential disciple-maker', 9),
(750022, 'Acts 6:7 records that the word of God spread and disciples:', 'multiple_choice', '["Decreased","Multiplied greatly","Stayed the same","Left Jerusalem"]', 'Multiplied greatly', 10),
(750022, 'Explain the principle of spiritual multiplication and how churches can develop multiplication cultures.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Multiplication involves disciples making disciples who make disciples. Churches develop multiplication cultures by casting vision, training all believers, creating simple reproducible processes, celebrating reproduction, and measuring multiplication not just addition.', 11),
-- Lesson 10: Integration (750023)
(750023, 'Evangelism and discipleship should be viewed as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Separate ministries","One continuous process","Competing priorities","Sequential programs"]', 'One continuous process', 1),
(750023, 'A clear pathway from conversion to multiplication includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Random activities","Intentional steps for growth at each stage","No structure","One-time events only"]', 'Intentional steps for growth at each stage', 2),
(750023, 'Effective churches integrate evangelism and discipleship by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Separating them completely","Creating seamless systems that connect both","Focusing on one only","Outsourcing both"]', 'Creating seamless systems that connect both', 3),
(750023, 'New believers need immediate:', 'multiple_choice', '["Advanced theology","Basic discipleship and community connection","Leadership roles","Independence"]', 'Basic discipleship and community connection', 4),
(750023, 'Evaluating evangelism-discipleship effectiveness involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Counting attendance only","Measuring conversions, growth, and reproduction","Avoiding metrics","Comparing to other churches"]', 'Measuring conversions, growth, and reproduction', 5),
(750023, 'Colossians 1:28-29 describes Paul''s goal as presenting everyone:', 'multiple_choice', '["As converts","Mature in Christ","As church members","As followers"]', 'Mature in Christ', 6),
(750023, 'Gaps in the evangelism-discipleship process often occur at:', 'multiple_choice', '["The beginning only","Transition points between stages","The end only","No specific points"]', 'Transition points between stages', 7),
(750023, 'Ephesians 4:11-16 describes the church growing to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Numerical size only","Maturity and unity in Christ","Independence from leaders","Institutional power"]', 'Maturity and unity in Christ', 8),
(750023, 'Continuous improvement of evangelism-discipleship requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring problems","Regular assessment and adjustment","Maintaining status quo","Copying other churches exactly"]', 'Regular assessment and adjustment', 9),
(750023, 'The ultimate measure of success is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Church size","Disciples who make disciples","Budget growth","Building programs"]', 'Disciples who make disciples', 10),
(750023, 'Describe how a church can create an integrated system that moves people from first contact through spiritual multiplication.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'An integrated system includes outreach events, clear gospel presentation, immediate follow-up, basic discipleship, community connection, ongoing growth opportunities, service involvement, leadership development, and multiplication training.', 11);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
